title: AGNI Pedagogical Archetypes v1.0
description: Defines coherent pedagogical archetype clusters across UTU, Bloom's taxonomy, VARK modalities, and teaching philosophy. Used by the compiler for coherence validation and by theta for lesson scoring.

version.description: Schema version for this archetype definition file.

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for this archetype.

description.description: One-sentence description of the pedagogical intent.

category.description: Core archetypes map 1:1 to a Band-group × Protocol cell. Specialty archetypes span multiple cells or represent cross-cutting patterns.

bandRange.description: Inclusive [min, max] UTU band range for this archetype.

protocols.description: UTU protocols this archetype applies to.

blooms.description: Bloom's taxonomy levels this archetype naturally targets.

varkProfile.description: Expected VARK modality distribution (weights should sum to ~1.0). Used for cosine-similarity alignment scoring.

teachingModes.description: Teaching modes that are pedagogically coherent with this archetype. First entry is the primary recommendation.

stepPattern.description: Recommended step-type sequence. Entries are step types from the OLS spec; '|' denotes alternatives (e.g. 'ordering|matching'). Serves as authoring guidance, not a hard constraint.

thetaModifier.description: Multiplier applied to the coherence bonus in theta scoring. 1.0 = neutral. >1.0 = amplifies the bonus for high-coherence matches. <1.0 = dampens it (use for archetypes where dimension alignment is less predictive of quality).

opening.description: Guidance for the lesson's first 1-2 steps.

assessment.description: Preferred assessment strategy and step types.

antipatterns.description: What to avoid — common mistakes for this archetype.

relatedArchetypes.description: IDs of archetypes that are close neighbors in the pedagogical space. Used for partial-credit scoring.
